details.reasoning: Implementation is nearly complete and correct. All rubric requirements are met: (1) INIObject.zig exists with create/parse/stringify functions with correct signatures returning JSValue; (2) parse correctly handles sections with nesting, key=value pairs, and both ; and # comments; (3) BunObject.zig properly wires INI via lazy property callback with getINIObject function; (4) C++ exports header includes macro(INI); (5) C++ hash table entry added in BunObject.cpp; (6) TypeScript definitions include INI namespace with parse/stringify signatures and comprehensive JSDoc; (7) Parser is self-contained with no external INI parser imports; (8) Code follows Zig conventions using jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, and @import("bun"). The integration into src/interchange.zig is correct. Comprehensive test suite provided. Minor deduction: PLAN.md file is created but empty, which may have been intended as documentation.
